mapper.select: SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year FROM ipo_subscription WHERE subscription_year = #{year} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year FROM ipo_subscription WHERE subscription_year = #{year} AND sold_date IS NOT NULL
SELECT id, stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year FROM ipo_subscription WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ipo_subscription (stock_name, broker, offering_price, sold_qty, sold_date, sold_price, tax_and_fee, subscription_fee, subscription_year) VALUES (#{stockName}, #{broker}, #{offeringPrice}, #{soldQty}, #{soldDate}, #{soldPrice}, #{taxAndFee}, #{subscriptionFee}, #{year})
mapper.update: UPDATE ipo_subscription SET stock_name = #{stockName}, broker = #{broker}, offering_price = #{offeringPrice}, sold_qty = #{soldQty}, sold_date = #{soldDate}, sold_price = #{soldPrice}, tax_and_fee = #{taxAndFee}, subscription_fee = #{subscriptionFee}, subscription_year = #{year} WHERE id = #{id}
